news.summary: The conflict, which erupted in 2023, has left behind a human toll which is "simply staggering", reports the BBC's Barbara Plett Usher.

news.headline: US controls chips in the AI race, but China controls the scoreboard
news.summary:
A quiet but consequential shift is reshaping the global artificial intelligence competition, and it has little to do with which country builds the most powerful model.
